textByHash.01981e6b3f032eb8c13c3b5fac4d5733fff987c3: No, I'm the one who works here.
textByHash.119eeeeaf8375534cb457892ae64f4e3d30f170f: Well, I get all of mine over at the clothing shop in Varrock. They sell them cheap there.
textByHash.3079c18ad0925b0cbb4b5fc6ab917b3aa7aa30e2: Great. You might as well take a look at the rest of my wares as well.
textByHash.3e84ed76380b57c7ba57b16006105635b2e871a8: Welcome to my food store! Would you like to buy anything?
textByHash.3fcafdd275f317a04cfb04dc1dea45152fe24278: Oh, and I'm sure that I've seen a spare one over in Gerrant's fish store somewhere. It's the little place just north of here.
textByHash.4603beece9e307eb00c55dd1d6e12c01b3e342f4: Well, you can't work here unless you have a white apron. Health and safety regulations, you understand.
textByHash.5aeb56a9155479c47ac1c3c8c0095d9d7241523f: Ah well, it'll give you something to do, won't it.
textByHash.69e1e88a0ee932a7ba038d1f9d8f88dc903ba518: Is it nice and tidy round the back now?
textByHash.6c8cfd6f43a42e9d7cb0c6774b7985dab108744b: You need to put your white apron on first though.
textByHash.6ee6e037b1ff54011a0221ca339f56776c3e405f: Well, it's your choice, but I do recommend them.
textByHash.76e11781d2ec510813a2de85f2997c4be3da480d: Can you put your white apron on before going in there, please?
textByHash.acdfda5353f5df3ddbad43497ac535f2d1b98e35: Wow - you are well prepared! You're hired. Go through to the back and tidy up for me, please.
textByHash.cb2736a8667c8231075496d2892db600a14d201f: We have this really exotic fruit all the way from Karamja. It's called a banana.
textByHash.f3a6150dea56798ab752aa7da82e419b14cb0b66: Hey, you can't go in there. Only employees of the grocery store can go in.
textByHash.fba96d5be990211fcb76ac52dda97b31bf0e4efd: Well, you're keen, I'll give you that. Okay, I'll give you a go. Have you got your own white apron?
